prompt: Tap right hole card before final late-street decision.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The right hole card is the anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the private-card cue that completes the tournament-pressure read.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right hole card is the target hole card because the final late-street decision still depends on the correct hand reference.
